name: Donchian Trend Continuation GER40 M15
hypothesis: GER40 M15 exhibits momentum continuation when a 20-bar Donchian high is broken during European cash hours (07:00-16:00 UTC) while ADX(14) >= 22 and ATR percentile > 50. Breakouts in chop or outside trend regime fail.

entry_rules.long: close crosses above dc20.high[1] AND close > ema50 AND adx14 >= 22
entry_rules.short: close crosses below dc20.low[1]  AND close < ema50 AND adx14 >= 22

exit_rules.trailing: Chandelier: highest_high(10) - 2.5*atr14 for longs, mirror for shorts; activates after +1R

notes: Trend-filtered breakout distinct from the XAUUSD session-range idea. Uses ADX to avoid the chop that killed gen40.
